PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('File')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''/some/file'')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('exists')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetExpressionTrueImpl(EXPRESSION_TRUE)
              PsiElement(TRUE)('true')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetResourceDefaultStatementImpl(RESOURCE_DEFAULT_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('File')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedAnyArgumentsListBlockImpl(BRACED_ANY_ARGUMENTS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
        PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('exists')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetExpressionTrueImpl(EXPRESSION_TRUE)
            PsiElement(TRUE)('true')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetSelectorImpl(SELECTOR)
          PsiPuppetExpressionIndexedImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEXED)
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('facts')
            PsiPuppetExpressionIndexImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEX)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''os'')
              PsiElement(])(']')
            PsiPuppetExpressionIndexImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEX)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''family'')
              PsiElement(])(']')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(?)('?')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetBracedSelectorValuesBlockImpl(BRACED_SELECTOR_VALUES_BLOCK)
            PsiElement({)('{')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
            PsiPuppetSelectorValueImpl(SELECTOR_VALUE)
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''Solaris'')
              PsiWhiteSpace('          ')
              PsiElement(=>)('=>')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''wheel'')
            PsiElement(,)(',')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
            PsiPuppetSelectorValueImpl(SELECTOR_VALUE)
              PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
                PsiElement(REGEX)('/(Darwin|FreeBSD)/')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(=>)('=>')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''wheel'')
            PsiElement(,)(',')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
            PsiPuppetSelectorValueImpl(SELECTOR_VALUE)
              PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
              PsiWhiteSpace('            ')
              PsiElement(=>)('=>')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''root'')
            PsiElement(,)(',')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
            PsiElement(})('}')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('param')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('val')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('File')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetSelectorImpl(SELECTOR)
          PsiPuppetExpressionIndexedImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEXED)
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('facts')
            PsiPuppetExpressionIndexImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEX)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''os'')
              PsiElement(])(']')
            PsiPuppetExpressionIndexImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEX)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''family'')
              PsiElement(])(']')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(?)('?')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetBracedSelectorValuesBlockImpl(BRACED_SELECTOR_VALUES_BLOCK)
            PsiElement({)('{')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
            PsiPuppetSelectorValueImpl(SELECTOR_VALUE)
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''Solaris'')
              PsiWhiteSpace('          ')
              PsiElement(=>)('=>')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''wheel'')
            PsiElement(,)(',')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
            PsiPuppetSelectorValueImpl(SELECTOR_VALUE)
              PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
                PsiElement(REGEX)('/(Darwin|FreeBSD)/')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(=>)('=>')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''wheel'')
            PsiElement(,)(',')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
            PsiPuppetSelectorValueImpl(SELECTOR_VALUE)
              PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
              PsiWhiteSpace('            ')
              PsiElement(=>)('=>')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''root'')
            PsiElement(,)(',')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
            PsiElement(})('}')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('param')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('val')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
